title: Agency Commercial Mortgage-Backed Securities - Federal Reserve Bank of New York

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This is a historical informational page describing the Federal Reserve's agency CMBS purchase program that operated from March 2020 to November 2021 as an emergency COVID-19 market support measure. The program was managed by BlackRock Financial Markets Advisory as a third-party vendor from March 2020 until contract termination on May 2, 2022. The program purchased multifamily mortgages guaranteed by Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae.
key_points: FOMC directed the Open Market Trading Desk to purchase agency CMBS effective March 23, 2020
Purchases were limited to multifamily mortgages fully guaranteed by Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, or Ginnie Mae
The Desk stopped purchasing agency CMBS effective November 4, 2021
BlackRock Financial Markets Advisory was retained as third-party vendor on March 24, 2020 to operationalize purchases
The BlackRock contract was terminated on May 2, 2022
Transaction data is published quarterly, approximately two years after transactions occurred
why_it_matters: This page documents the Fed's historical use of agency CMBS purchases as an emergency liquidity tool during COVID-19 market stress. Understanding past Fed balance sheet operations provides context for future policy responses. The information is relevant for market structure analysis of how the Fed engages external managers and the operational framework for purchasing structured products.
market_structure_context: The page describes the Fed's operational framework for agency CMBS purchases, including the use of external vendors (BlackRock), approved counterparties, and the transition to publishing transaction data pursuant to the Dodd-Frank Act. This provides transparency into Fed market operations and vendor management practices.

issues_found: Source URL is missing from metadata, limiting verifiability
Published date is unknown; source appears to be a static institutional page without a publication date
Program described is historical (ended November 2021), approximately 4.5 years before TODAY; lacks clear archival framing beyond being a program description

notes: Source is a New York Fed institutional page describing a concluded Fed emergency program. The page documents operational details rather than providing analysis or current policy. While relevant to market structure (Fed operations), the content is historical and informational. No URL was provided in metadata, limiting verifiability. The mention of 'Oct 29, 2025' in the body refers to a separate statement about reinvestment, not the publication date of this page.
